categories.name: Hand Knotted Carpets
categories.description: The pinnacle of rug craftsmanship, featuring dense, intricate patterns bound knot by knot.

categories.name: Hand Woven Rugs
categories.description: Plush, bespoke comfort crafted utilizing a modern tufting gun for versatile design expressions.

categories.name: Flatweave & Kilim
categories.description: Timeless, low-profile rugs woven without a pile, perfect for modern and rustic interiors alike.

categories.name: Custom & Bespoke
categories.description: Tailor-made designs bringing your unique architectural and interior visions to life.

gallery.title: Persian Motif Hand-Knotted
gallery.description: A stunning masterpiece featuring traditional Persian motifs, meticulously hand-knotted using hand-spun wool and natural dyes. Its intricate details and rich heritage make it a perfect centerpiece for both classic and contemporary spaces.
features: Knot Count: 100 knots per square inch

gallery.title: Abstract Oushak Overdyed
gallery.description: This overdyed Oushak rug blends antique charm with modern aesthetics. It undergoes a specialized distressing and dyeing process to achieve a vibrant yet faded look that seamlessly integrates into bohemian or minimalist decors.
features: Material: Wool pile on cotton foundation

gallery.title: Muted Kazak Runner
gallery.description: A flatweave runner reflecting the rich heritage of nomadic tribal designs. Characterized by its striking geometric patterns and subdued color palette, it offers excellent durability suitable for high-traffic areas like hallways.

gallery.title: Modern Minimalist Woven
gallery.description: Embodying the essence of Scandinavian minimalism, this hand-tufted rug features a plush, incredibly soft pile. The subtle textured variations and neutral tones create a grounding element for modern interior sanctuaries.
features: Material: Blended New Zealand Wool & Viscose

gallery.title: Bespoke Geometric Silk
gallery.description: An architectural marvel woven in silk and wool. The dynamic geometric patterns catch the light uniquely depending on the viewing angle, offering a bespoke tactile luxury tailored to exact spatial specifications.
features: Customization: Scale and palette bespoke to client

gallery.title: Rustic Kilim Weave
gallery.description: Woven tightly without a pile, this kilim rug brings an earthy, rustic charm. Using undyed natural wool tones combined with subtle vegetable dye highlights, it's an eco-conscious choice for the contemporary home.
